_description: Catalog of realistic adverse events that can be injected into a stay simulation to prevent the LLM's marketing-speak bias. Each stay has a configurable probability of receiving 0, 1, or 2 events. Event severity drives how negatively it nudges sensation dimensions and whether it escalates.
_calibration_notes: 2026-04-18: reduced delta magnitudes ~25% across the board + shifted resolution_quality distribution toward better recovery (excellent 20% → 28%, unresolved 15% → 8%) to reflect 5-star hotel operational discipline. Previous calibration over-punished incidents, dropping subcategory scores too low vs empirical Villa Le Blanc 4.5-4.9/5 subscores.

injection_config._trigger_probability_by_tier_notes: 2026-04-18: multiplier applied on top of probability_at_least_one_event_per_stay and the target-star forced probability. Luxury 5★ reviews empirically mention friction in ~10-15% of stays; budget properties closer to 40-50%. Capped at 1.0.

events.label: Luggage arrival delayed by airline
events.narrative_hint: Airline-delayed suitcase arrives 4-6 hours after check-in. Guest has to request essentials from hotel.

events.label: Room not ready at promised check-in time
events.narrative_hint: Room not ready at 15:00 check-in. Guest asked to wait 40-90 minutes. Lobby seating offered but no proactive F&B comp.

events.label: Overbooking: downgrade to standard room despite booking suite/upgrade
events.narrative_hint: Property overbooked. Guest downgraded to standard room with rate adjustment. Compensation offered varies by staff empowerment.

events.label: Wi-Fi intermittent or below advertised speed
events.narrative_hint: Wi-Fi drops during Zoom call / streaming / large upload. Measures 15-30 Mbps instead of advertised 200 Mbps. Requires tech support call.

events.label: Loud neighboring room disrupting sleep
events.narrative_hint: Bachelor/ette group or bachelorette party next door until 02:00. Front desk called to intervene. Resolution inconsistent.

events.label: AC/heating malfunction in room
events.narrative_hint: AC unit stuck or stops cooling. Room temperature inappropriate overnight. Maintenance dispatched with 30-120 min delay.

events.label: Dietary / allergy request mishandled
events.narrative_hint: Gluten-free / nut-free / dairy-free request communicated at booking not honored. Dish sent back. Kitchen response variable.

events.label: Pool closed for maintenance without advance notice
events.narrative_hint: Main pool closed for maintenance day 2-3 without prior communication. Alternative pool crowded or unavailable.

events.label: Breakfast buffet low quality or understaffed
events.narrative_hint: Buffet repetitive day 3+, stations emptied not restocked, thin coffee, long wait for fresh eggs.

events.label: Unexpected fee discovered at checkout
events.narrative_hint: Resort fee / parking fee / minibar / wifi charge appears on bill that guest expected included. Dispute at front desk.

events.label: Specific staff interaction marked by indifference
events.narrative_hint: One staff member (receptionist / waiter / concierge) treats guest as transaction. Cold tone, no eye contact, script-reading.

events.label: Construction or renovation noise near guest room
events.narrative_hint: Nearby renovation or pool-area construction starts 8:30 AM, audible in room. Property did not disclose at booking.

events.label: Spa booking confusion or cancellation
events.narrative_hint: Spa treatment booked at check-in is cancelled / double-booked. Alternative offered is worse time slot or different therapist.

events.label: Bathroom issue (hot water, drain, fixture)
events.narrative_hint: Hot water fails for 15-30 min / drain slow / shower head broken / outlet doesn't work. Maintenance visit required.

events.label: Long check-in queue at peak arrival
events.narrative_hint: 12-18 minute queue at front desk during 15:00-17:00 peak. No triage for loyalty members or pre-checked guests.
